text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Super Creek struggles with her health, an
unexpected savior comes to her rescue during
summer camp.

Hahaha! Looks like you're really strugglin' there,
Creek!

Well, I'm here to give ya a real challenge! That's
right, I—

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
No I am not! I'm Creek's best pal, Tamamo Cross!
But ya know, ya got great comedic timing!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Right! C'mon, Creek. Try and beat me at a run
along the beach!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Huff... pant... My... legs...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Runnin' on fumes, huh? But you know what ya
need at a time like this?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Drive! Ya got no get up and go 'cause you're all
outta motivation!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Whatcha gonna do with a feeble drive like that?
If ya wanna spoil your trainer, then dig deep!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: For Trainer... For Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Gahhh...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Eh? What's all this about?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...I thought this might happen.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, weird. I thought she just needed some
drive.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: At this rate, you're never gonna beat me.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Huff... wheeze... I'm sorry... I'm so, so sorry...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I want to do my best for you... but I just don't
have the energy...
choice_data_list:
If you can't do it on your own, why don't we run
as a team?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Huh? As a team?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
What's that now? Are the two of ya gonna run a
relay?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Weird... I don't see how a trainer's gonna be much
help in an Umamusume race.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But whatever. I'll give ya a li'l handicap then. Ya
can have a head start!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek should be the anchor leg, so I'll start
with an all-out sprint!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Whaaa?! You're pretty fast! Not bad!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Since when were you this fit, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My own strength and stamina have increased over
the time I've spent with Super Creek—which
means...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, that'll do for your handicap. If you're
gonna push that hard, then I'm gonna get down to
business too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross overtakes me in an instant, but I
still keep running, squeezing out every last ounce
of energy I have...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Come on, Trainer! Come to me!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Traaaaineeerrr!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Dazed and winded, I pass the baton to Super
Creek. At that moment...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Just you wait, Tamtam! YAAAAAHHHHH!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Whoooa! The heck's up with Creek's energy?!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I can win. I'm going to win. I will win!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
With our powers combined, there's nothing we
can't do!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
By the time I recover, the sun has already set.
And the result?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Aww, nuts. Ya beat me, straight up. I thought
your trainer would just slow ya down for sure...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
The handicap gave you an advantage, and your
energy was wild, Creek. What the heck
happened?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I don't know, but my chest didn't tighten up like it
usually does, and it felt like my body was moving
on its own...
choice_data_list: See, you should let me help you sometimes.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain to her that feeling obligated to shoulder
everything on her own is the cause of her illness.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When I tell her I want to help by having her rely
on me a little more...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Ohhh... So that's why...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
The idea that I have to work hard on your behalf
is what caused all this, huh?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I get it now. Guess that means ya were too
focused.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Sounds like Creek to a T. Props to you for figurin'
it out and helpin' her see.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You've grown to be so capable, Trainer. I can't
believe I didn't even realize that myself...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: You're such a good trainer, and I'm such a bad Umamusume... Sniffle...
choice_data_list: Together, we'll become an unstoppable team.
Together, we'll become an unstoppable team.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Of course! Ah, right... There's more I'd like to talk
to you about, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Tell me all about how strong you've become,
okay?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Mm-hmm, now that's what I like to see. Happy for
ya, Creek!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Are ya even listenin'?! I'm not just some
background character in your dramatic scene,
y'know!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, I put together a looser schedule for
the summer so that Super Creek can relax.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Several weeks later...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, we've been having a blast every day. I
especially enjoyed feeding each other at the
night market! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I almost wish this summer camp would never end...
But that's the lazy part of me talking.
choice_data_list: It's okay to feel that way.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. You've given me the opportunity to
really relax.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: It feels like my whole body is slowly recovering...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has the same smile as when I first met her. I've
finally been able to do something for her.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
But our summer camp isn't over yet. How do you
want to spend the rest of it?
choice_data_list: Let's go on a ghost hunt.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
A sumo wrestling tournament? You mean on the
beach? Hehe, great idea! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
But I'm not going to lose! I'll squeeze you tightly
and roll you onto the ground! Hehehe!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We take it easy for the rest of our time together.
Super Creek builds up her power while enjoying
herself.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
A ghost hunt? I don't mind, but I have pretty slow
reactions.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Like, it takes me a while to realize whenever a
ghost pops out at me.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Because of that, my screams are always a few
seconds late, so don't laugh at me, okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, she reacts to all the scares just as she
described. But the more she has fun, the more
courageous she becomes.
